items.caption: A promotional graphic with a blue background. on the left side, there is a laptop displaying a webpage with a form, suggesting an online platform for lead apron inspection. on the right side, there is a white and black apron with the word "smart" printed on it, indicating the brand. the text "the importance of regular lead apron inspection" is prominently displayed in the center, emphasizing the message that the image is likely conveying about the significance of regular inspection of lead aprons, which are commonly used in industries where lead is handled. the overall style of the image is clean and professional, designed to communicate a message about safety and compliance.
